attempt_local_note: The canonical closed_loop_development_verdict.py consumer requires a closed-loop-current-state projection resolving to a canonical closed-loop-attempt-state.v1 leaf with required_actor 'human_reviewer'. No such attempt-state file exists for this attempt-local B/C lineage (same gap that kept C on the minimal honest artifact set instead of the v4 packet machinery). This verdict is therefore recorded as a minimal honest attempt-local instance of the same schema, not produced by the canonical consumer. It supersedes the historical human_review:'pending' fields in provenance.json and regression.json by lineage; those files are left unmodified as historical evidence.
verdict_translation: Accepted as a development baseline; overall polish/completeness is explicitly NOT claimed (it 'got better', separate from completeness).
scope_note: Development-baseline acceptance of the bounded R5.2 repair only (Panel A 'sulfur segment' label moved fully inside the frame). Overall figure polish and completeness are NOT claimed. This is not release acceptance and not publication acceptance.
